title: Two-signature bundle slot (maker-checker stretch-ready, NOT wired — HELM-PHASE3-BUILD-SPEC.md §3.7)
description: Reserves the shape for serverless maker-checker (Phase-4 candidate, not built in Phase 3): a maker's evidence bundle plus zero or more independent checker countersignatures, each over the SAME bundle_digest the maker signed. No producer in Phase 3 emits countersignatures — the array is expected empty. This schema exists so a Phase-4 checker feature has a stable shape to fill in rather than inventing one under deadline; it does not imply any bundle is unverified without a countersignature (maker_signature alone is a complete, valid bundle per §26.7).

replay_verified.description: True iff the checker independently re-ran the workflow deterministically and got a matching bundle_digest before countersigning — the flagship differentiator over a rubber-stamp approval.

countersignatures.description: Empty in Phase 3. A future maker-checker feature appends entries here; nothing in Phase 3 reads or requires them.
